rationale: The citing paper’s core mechanism is that firm-generated content increases sales indirectly via user-generated content/online WOM, while the cited paper develops a broad framework and evidence on online/offline WOM antecedents (including Twitter mentions). That construct overlap suggests the cited work could be a foundational theory/mechanism source rather than an incidental mention. Although the raw match is only a DOI entry with no quoted citation context, it is not safely droppable as obvious mention-only.
